content.en:
In these tens of billions of Dao eras, Ye Tian has studied the Black Leaf Demon Gold countless times.

At the beginning, he really didn't study anything, and he couldn't use the origin energy of the Black Leaf Demon Gold.

However, in countless researches, he gradually mastered a little mystery, and he was not afraid of the influence of the Black Leaf Demon Gold on the Eternal Dao Species, and dared to try it randomly.

In addition, he also had the Tianyan Roulette Wheel for deduction, and finally let him research and create a secret technique that could absorb the origin of the Black Leaf Demon Gold.

Ye Tian named this secret art the Black Leaf Secret Technique.

Subsequently, he used the Black Leaf Secret Technique to absorb the origin of the Black Leaf Demon Gold, which was used to refine his Eternal Dao Seed to see how effective this secret technique was.

Time passed.

"The effect of the Black Leaf Demon Gold is really good!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

He had finally found a treasure that could replace the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal, but he had also discovered that the origin of the Black Leaf Demon Gold was extremely domineering.

Even if his wife and children are perfect eternal Dao seeds and will not be transformed by demon seeds, their cultivation is still a little worse at present, and it is difficult to bear the origin of the Black Leaf Demon Gold, if they want to refine the origin of the Black Leaf Demon Gold, the foundation of the Eternal Dao Seed will be affected a little. 05

When they break through a little more, they can refine the Black Leaf Demon Gold Origin.

"It's a pity that there are too few Black Leaf Demon Gold Origins!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the past 10 billion Dao era, although he has collected a lot of resources in the East Wu Realm Seam Realm, he has not continued to attack high-level demon seeds, and even if he attacks high-level demon seeds, he may not be able to obtain Black Leaf Demon Gold.

"How can I get a large amount of Black Leaf Demon Gold?"

Ye Tian was thinking about this question at the moment.

If he didn't have enough Black Leaf Demon Gold, he wouldn't be able to quickly improve his Eternal Dao Seed!

But there is no doubt that such things as Black Leaf Magic Gold are rare and extremely rare.

After thinking about it, he felt that it was better to trade with other high-level realm gods in order to hope for a large amount of Black Leaf Demon Gold.

For example, Zuo Xu Realm God, a high-level realm god, knows the Black Leaf Demon Gold, and he may have the Black Leaf Demon Gold on his body.

It's just that even if they can't use the Black Leaf Demon Gold, they won't take out the Black Leaf Demon Gold to other realm gods.

Therefore, if you want to trade a large amount of Black Leaf Demon Gold from them, you have to come up with the resources they need.

"Over the years, I have obtained a lot of resources in the East Wu Realm Seam Realm, and I have killed a lot of demon seeds, many of which are resources that help high-level realm gods refine the eternal Dao seed and assist high-level realm gods to impact and condense the eternal realm spirits, which is enough to make a high-level realm god like Zuo Xu Realm God excited!"

Ye Tian thought so.

But now there is a problem, that is, his acquisition of such a large amount of Black Leaf Demon Gold will inevitably cause doubts and even suspicions among the high-level realm gods, and it is estimated that there will be some ideas in their hearts.

In the eyes of the high-level realm gods, coveting a mid-level realm god naturally felt that it could be easily handled.

When the time comes, something bad will definitely happen.

He will inevitably clash with these high-level realm gods, and that won't be good!

Thinking about it, there seems to be only one way.

That is to directly show strength, so that the high-level realm gods are afraid.

Although those high-level realm gods would be more interested in him, they would never dare to attack him.

After all, he is very strong in his own right.

......

The boundary of the East Black Boundary.

Ye Tian was no longer low-key, and began to frantically kill those middle-level demon species, even high-level demon species.

Somewhere.

Ye Tian encountered three high-level demon seeds, and these three high-level demon seeds saw Ye Tian and were ready to solve them at any time.

However, they soon became confused.

Rumble!!!!!!

As one demon seed after another was killed, the demon seed side panicked and sent more high-level demon seeds.

But this time, Ye Tian did not hide, but directly shook these high-level demon seeds.

this day.

Ye Tian single-handedly killed dozens of mid-level peak demon seeds and eight high-level demon seeds, including one high-level demon seed that condensed eight eternal realm spirits, and killed six high-level demon seeds, and other middle-level peak demon seeds were also killed by him.

Only the two high-level demon seeds of Love were left to rely on special treasures, so that Ye Tian did not notice, so that they could escape. []

And after this battle, Ye Tian's reputation completely spread in the East Wu Realm Crack Realm, and the demon seeds began to fear Ye Tian.

......

In the ancient city of the boundary of the East Wu Boundary.

Ye Tian is back.

This time, one after another high-level realm gods came over and came to visit him.

In fact, one is to spy on the situation, the second is to make friends, and the third is to discuss something with Ye Tian.

Among them, including the Zuo Xu Realm God.

Ye Tian talked with them for a long time, and these high-level realm gods were all curious about why Ye Tian's combat power was so strong, but he flickered around and didn't reveal anything.

However, what these high-level realm gods finally discussed with him was to let him fully assist the top forces to snatch down the boundary of the Eastern Black Realm Seam, completely suppress the Eternal Dao Species, and let the Eternal Dao Seeds be in the realm of being completely suppressed or even automatically abandoning the Eastern Wu Realm Seam here.

Ye Tian didn't completely guarantee it, he could only say as much as possible.

Followed by.

Ye Tian said that he wanted to buy the Black Leaf Demon Gold.

"Black Leaf Demon Gold, I do have it, but not much!" Zuo Xu Realm Shinto.

Some other high-level realm gods also said that they had them, but not many.

"Guys, how many of you, how much I buy!"

Ye Tian said.

Subsequently, he took out his own resources, all of which were useful to Zuo Xu Realm Gods and their high-level realm gods. 367

Zuo Xu Realm God has traded directly, but some high-level realm gods have not traded yet.

Other than that.

There are relatively few high-level realm gods who have entered the realm of the Dongwu Realm Seam, and there will definitely be high-level realm gods who will come to trade with him in the future.

......

After they left, they began to discuss.

"Why do you say that the Ye Heavenly Realm God wants to buy the Black Leaf Demon Gold? Could it be that he has the means to absorb the origin of the Black Leaf Demon Gold?"

"Even if he has a secret method to absorb the Black Leaf Demon Gold Origin, but the Black Leaf Demon Gold Origin will cause the Eternal Dao Seed Demon Seed to turn into a Demon Seed, unless the Ye Heaven Realm God cultivates the Perfect Eternal Dao Seed, he will not be affected by the Black Leaf Demon Gold Origin. "

"It is very unlikely that the Ye Heaven Realm God will have the Perfect Eternal Dao Seed Inheritance, and in the Realm God Realm, there are only a few supreme forces that have the Perfect Eternal Dao Seed Inheritance. And the Perfect-level Eternal Dao Inheritance can only be inherited a total of nine times, and after nine inheritances, it can no longer be inherited. It is said that the Perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed Inheritance of those top forces has been exhausted, and even the inheritance has been broken, how can the Ye Heaven Realm God obtain the Perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed Inheritance?"

"In any case, the strength of the Ye Heaven Realm God is already stronger than ours, and it deserves to be a high-level realm god combat power, which should not be underestimated. "

"He must have gained a lot this time, but it's a pity that I don't have the Black Leaf Demon Gold, otherwise I would definitely have to trade. "

They discussed it privately for a while, and then they went their separate ways.
